About Me

A Journey Shaped by
Experience & Growth

Every professional journey is shaped by experience, learning, and growth. Mine has taken me through finance, taxation, entrepreneurship, and healthcare operations — and today continues as a Business Management & Entrepreneurship student committed to lifelong learning and innovation.

Rooted in Guyana and building my future in Canada, I bring a multicultural perspective and a deep work ethic forged across two continents and multiple industries over more than 20 years.

Today, I am expanding my knowledge in innovation, leadership, and business strategy — combining the depth of lived professional experience with the rigour of formal academic study.

"Professional growth is not a destination — it is a continuous journey of learning, adapting, and becoming."
Chapter 1
Accounting, Auditing & Taxation
Built a strong financial foundation through rigorous work in accounting, auditing, and tax — developing precision, integrity, and analytical thinking.
Chapter 2
Entrepreneurship
Ventured into business ownership, gaining first-hand experience building, managing, and growing a venture from the ground up.
Chapter 3
Healthcare Administration
Transitioned into healthcare operations, developing systems thinking, cross-functional leadership, and process optimisation skills.
Today
Business Management & Entrepreneurship Student
Pursuing formal education at Algonquin College, integrating decades of real-world experience with modern strategic frameworks.
Next Chapter
Future Entrepreneur & Business Leader
Aspiring to create meaningful impact through entrepreneurial ventures, innovative leadership, and a lifelong commitment to learning.
"The ability to learn is the most important quality a leader can have."
— Padmasree Warrior
Professional Philosophy

What I Believe

01
Integrity Matters

Trust is built through consistency, accountability, and doing the right thing even when no one is watching. Integrity is the foundation every sustainable business is built on.

02
Learning Never Stops

Every role, challenge, and opportunity has taught me something valuable. Professional growth is a continuous journey of learning, adapting, and becoming more.

03
People Make the Difference

Strong relationships, collaboration, and mutual respect are at the heart of meaningful success. The best results come from teams that trust and elevate each other.

Professional Experience

A Career Across Industries

Finance
Accounting & Auditing

Developed a rigorous foundation in financial reporting, audit processes, and compliance — building the analytical discipline that underlies every business decision I make today.

Taxation
Tax & Financial Advisory

Navigated complex tax structures and financial planning engagements, sharpening technical expertise and client relationship skills across diverse industries.

Entrepreneurship
Business Ownership & Operations

Founded and operated a business, taking full ownership of strategy, operations, customer experience, and growth — gaining real-world entrepreneurial insight that no classroom can replicate.

Healthcare
Office Administrator & Billing Agent

Currently working as an Office Administrator and Billing Agent in a healthcare setting since January, handling administrative operations, billing processes, and supporting the smooth day-to-day functioning of the office.

Applied Learning · Group Project

Vision Boost — Digital Marketing Campaign

As part of a collaborative group project, our team developed a digital marketing strategy for Vision Boost, covering branding, social media, SEO, and advertising. I contributed as the Website Specialist, working alongside my teammates to bring our ideas to life. This was a team effort that taught me the value of collaboration, communication, and shared creativity.

"If you don't build your dream, someone else will hire you to help them build theirs."
— Dhirubhai Ambani
